sections.heading: Short title This Act
sections.text: may be cited as the British Acts Extension Act. [As amended by S.I. No. 72 of 1964]

sections.heading: British Acts
sections.text: extended to Zambia The Acts of the Parliament of the United Kingdom set forth in the Schedule shall be deemed to be of full force and effect within Zambia.

4. Substitution of the Public Holidays Act for the Bank Holidays Act, 1871, in the Bills of Exchange Act, 1882 1 The Bills of Exchange Act, 1882, of the Parliament of the United Kingdom shall in its application to Zambia be read as if the words "the Public Holidays Act" were substituted for the words "the Bank Holidays Act, 1871," and as if the words "public holiday" were substituted for the words "bank holiday". 1 See the Cheques Act, section 8 (Cap. 424) [No. 13 of 1946]

sections.heading: Amendment of section
sections.text: 1 of the Friendly Societies Act, 1896 Section 1 of the Friendly Societies Act, 1896, of the Parliament of the United Kingdom shall in its application to Zambia be amended by the repeal of subsection (4). [No. 33 of 1954]
